<<<<<<< HEAD <<<<<<< HEAD LocalLLM
Chat Models History Benchmark Settings
New Chat Type your message… Send Stop No model selected No active model Please select a model from settings or download a new one to start. LocalLLM Ready All processing runs locally on your device\nwith no internet connection Loading model… Assistant is typing… Model connected No model Failed to load model session An error occurred during generation No active model. Please select a model from settings before starting a conversation.
Models %d installed Choose a model compatible with your device RAM Active Activate Download Downloading… Incompatible Uninstall Insufficient RAM: %1$dMB available, %2$dMB required Insufficient storage: %1$dMB available, %2$dMB required
Conversations %d conversations Search conversation titles… No conversations yet Start a new conversation from the Chat tab Delete Conversation \"%s\" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. %d messages Today Yesterday This Week This Month
Benchmark Run Benchmark Running… Live Results Past Results Benchmark error
Settings Customize model behavior Engine Inference Controls response creativity Word suggestion range (Nucleus Sampling) Maximum response length Context window size (affects memory usage) Network & Download Wi-Fi Only Download models via Wi-Fi to save data Appearance Dark Mode About Reset Reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone. 100%% Local
Delete Cancel OK Search Error ======= نبض Local Gemma Agent Service >>>>>>> 050ce6414e57d683a82e894e3da65e4ca8aa1ae5 ======= نبض Local Gemma Agent Service >>>>>>> 050ce6414e57d683a82e894e3da65e4ca8aa1ae5
